description_for_human: Connect all your apps through one MCP URL. Works with Notion, Gmail, Calendar, GitHub, Drive, and 10+ more.
description_for_model: OctoDock is a universal MCP server. Use octodock_do(app, action, params) to operate any connected app. Use octodock_help() to discover available apps and actions. Supports Notion, Gmail, Google Calendar, GitHub, Google Drive, Sheets, Docs, Tasks, YouTube, Canva, LINE, Telegram, Discord, Slack, Threads, Instagram. Features cross-agent memory that persists preferences and patterns across AI platforms.
